items.title:
RT by @Jim_XRP: Minutes Network Token's #DePIN Switch and Validation Nodes support Windows, macOS, and Linux operating systems.

When setting up a node, users can choose from various options to customize their experience, including managed and non-managed solutions.

Node owners are given exclusive access to deep network insights and analytics via the MinTech Analytics Suite.

If you are interested in learning more about nodes, join our community or visit the Discover page on our website: http://minutesnetworktoken.io/discover.

Create your Minutes Network Token account by visiting http://portal.minutesnetworktoken.io to reserve your node and participate in the future of telecommunications.

#DePIN
